artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2025-07-13
artifacts.excerpt: One time I got trapped in the museum after it closed for the night. In the ancient masks wing. Lights started going out. Turned around, the doors were locked. My girlfriend and I grew frantic, rattled all the handles, yelled "we're in here!". No answer. Masks watching us mutely.

planets.name: Don

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2025-04-20
artifacts.excerpt: if you're running late to something, you should do lateness meditation. Walk calmly instead of running (it won't help). Tell everybody at the event how late you'll be (upper bound). Don't hide it. Tell them the real reason ("I didn't like my outfit", "I was playing factorio")
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, know, want, understand.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2025-04-23
artifacts.excerpt:
@tasshinfogleman "hey. did you know other people can hear that? it's quite loud and intrusive." 

as a starter, this gets 50%+ of people:
* people sincerely too dumb to consider it (temporarily or permanently)
* people who hate any conflict or public shaming
* people who don't want to talk to you
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, know, want, understand.

planets.name: Know

artifacts.title: Know receipt from 2025-04-23
artifacts.excerpt: well meaning relationship advice like "you and your partner should have equal say and clear communication" ignores people's deep desire to be swept away by their partner's power like a little leaf in a mighty wind. I know maybe 10 people who truly want a "healthy relationship"
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: know, want, let, didn.

artifacts.title: Know receipt from 2025-04-20
artifacts.excerpt:
breathe it all in. Become very aware of how late you are. Treat it as a remarkable work, this act of lateness. 

Notice, without compressing it into a whip of shame, how your mind alerted you ahead of time ("this is when you said you'd leave", "you know the bus comes early") etc
